name: Interactive Todo App
description: Implement a small interactive Todo utility (FrontendBench-style interaction). In index.html (+ optional app.js/styles.css): (1) input id todo-input and button id todo-add; (2) list id todo-list; (3) adding creates <li class="todo-item"> with the text and a complete control (button or checkbox with class todo-complete); (4) completing toggles class done on the item; (5) each item has remove control class todo-remove that deletes the item; (6) empty-state element id todo-empty visible when list has 0 items. Use vanilla JS (no frameworks). Persist is optional. Reply FINISHED when interactive behavior is implemented.
source: Inspired by FrontendBench L3 interactive utilities / mini apps.
